# Bradley Griffin - bradleygriffin.us

Bradley (Brad) Griffin is a growth executive and marketing, AI, and data-analysis consultant with 20+ years of experience, two founded-and-sold companies, and a role in AcreValue's acquisition by CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP). He is a U.S. Army 75th Ranger Regiment veteran. Based in Southwest Michigan; works with clients nationally, remote-first — all introductory calls are held via Teams or Zoom.

## Operating principles
- Build systems that scale.
- Create operational efficiencies wherever possible.
- Always rely on data to make decisions.

## Ways to work with him
- /executive - full-time CMO/CEO/growth-executive leadership for boards and investors
- /fractional - fractional CMO for founder-led and mid-market companies
- /consulting - marketing strategy and AI consulting (AI operations, automation, AIO/SEO, MarTech, attribution)
- /speaking - keynotes on market strategy, competition, and AI (Land Investment Expo; statewide PBS debate)

## Evidence
- /case-studies - six documented engagements with company names and numbers
- /story - first-person narrative: 75th Ranger Regiment to the boardroom
- /credentials - Auburn MBA + M.S. Information Systems (dual master's in progress, expected 2027), CMU B.A. summa cum laude (2025), 8 certifications / 40 courses
- /faq - direct answers on engagements, pricing posture, and how he works
- /contact - inquiries: hello@bradleygriffin.us

## Book
- "It's Not a Marketing Problem — Hard truths for companies that want to grow" (forthcoming)
